title: A-Hero Skills for PVE
introduction: Some A heroes can provide useful utility in PVE, especially when stronger alternatives are not yet available.
Their value usually comes from healing reduction, crowd control, ally buffs, energy control or defensive support.
warning: A heroes are generally not recommended for PVP. They are difficult to build for survivability, and most of their buffs can be obtained from stronger S or S+ heroes. Cupid is noted as an exception because of her distinctive support effect.

heroes.name: Cupid
heroes.description: Heals all allies, reduces enemy healing and increases attack and healing effect by 40% for the heroes in positions 1 and 2.
notes: If Cupid occupies position 1 or 2, the buff moves to the next available position.
The position-based buff is lost when one of the affected heroes dies.

heroes.name: Valkyrie
heroes.description: Her basic attack has a 60% chance to stun enemies for one round.

heroes.name: Order
heroes.description: Reduces enemy healing by 20% for two rounds.

heroes.name: Cheetah Girl
heroes.description: Stuns a random enemy in the front row for two turns, increases allied Armor and drains enemy energy.

heroes.name: Lady Icy
heroes.description: Reduces enemy Speed and can freeze enemies.

heroes.name: Bullfight
heroes.description: Can stun an enemy for two rounds.

heroes.name: Abyss Titan
heroes.description: Increases allied healing effect and Armor with the ultimate skill.

heroes.name: Master Program
heroes.description: Increases allied Speed and can stun an enemy.

heroes.name: Miss USA
heroes.description: Increases the attack and Armor of allied Superman heroes.

heroes.name: Bread Hero
heroes.description: Reduces damage received by front-row allies.

heroes.name: Mask Man
heroes.description: Can apply an area-of-effect stun for two rounds.
